experts.title: Senior Administrative Management Professional / Co-Director, ACSD

experts.title: Program Management / DRG-CVE Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Program management specialist with 20+ years in humanitarian relief, countering violent extremism (CVE), stabilization, human rights and governance across West and Central Africa, with deep USAID and EU grant compliance and donor reporting experience.

donor_experience.notes: DRG/CVE Specialist USAID/Sahel Regional Office (2020-2025); Program Management Assistant USAID/Mauritania (2017-2020)
Project Director, EU-funded Promotion of Human Rights and Strengthening of National Unity (Senegal River Valley); CVE coordination platform support (2018)
Supported Mauritania Demographic Health Survey design/execution (2019-2020) alongside other international partners
Multi-donor humanitarian flooding response in Brackna and Gorgol, Mauritania (2018)

experts.title: Senior Social Scientist / MEAL Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Senior social scientist with 30+ years supporting USAID and donor-funded programs in 28 countries, specializing in MEAL systems strengthening, adaptive management, applied qualitative research and evaluation, with deep Sahel and West Africa expertise.

donor_experience.notes: 72+ short-term assignments since 1980 across design, performance monitoring, evaluation and adaptive management for USG-funded programs; Sahel partner mapping via ACSD (2024-2025)
Deputy Team Leader/consultant 1989-2004: portfolio assessments, environmental reviews, resettlement/gender analyses in Burkina Faso and Mali; River Blindness Control Program impact study

experts.title: Senior Gender, Social Inclusion, and Human Rights Specialist
experts.bio_summary: Senior Gender, Social Inclusion and Human Rights Specialist with 15+ years designing, implementing and evaluating donor-funded programs in fragile and conflict-affected environments, integrating gender, GBV, Do No Harm and human rights into resilience, food security, WASH, health and governance programs across the Sahel and East Africa.

Fond Commun Genre pooled fund co-financier

Project Coordinator, USAID-funded Sexual and Reproductive Health Rights Promotion Project (2015-2016); Gender Specialist, USAID/FFP VIM Project (2012-2014)
